svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="zF6Hfrlv8w_bNYHk2cn2"> <mxGraphModel dx="933" dy="554" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
title SysML State Machine Diagram - Communication Loss Scenario

skinparam state {
 BackgroundColor White
 BorderColor Black
}

[*] --> PlatoonOperation

state PlatoonOperation {
 [*] --> Connected

 Connected --> MonitoringCommunication : start monitoring

 MonitoringCommunication --> MonitoringCommunication : heartbeat received / continue platoon control

 MonitoringCommunication --> CommunicationWarning : weak signal detected

 CommunicationWarning --> MonitoringCommunication : signal stable again

 CommunicationWarning --> CommunicationLost : timeout > 2 seconds

 CommunicationLost --> SafeMode : communication loss confirmed
}

SafeMode : entry / reduce speed if necessary
SafeMode : entry / increase following distance
SafeMode : entry / disable cooperative platoon control

SafeMode --> ReconnectionProcess : start recovery procedure

state ReconnectionProcess {
 [*] --> AttemptReconnect

 AttemptReconnect --> WaitingForResponse : send reconnection request

 WaitingForResponse --> ConnectionRestored : valid response received

 WaitingForResponse --> AttemptReconnect : no response / retry

 AttemptReconnect --> ReconnectionFailed : retry limit reached

 ConnectionRestored --> [*]
 ReconnectionFailed --> [*]
}

ReconnectionProcess --> RejoinPlatoon : connection restored

RejoinPlatoon : entry / request leader approval
RejoinPlatoon : entry / synchronize speed and distance

RejoinPlatoon --> NormalPlatoonDriving : leader approves rejoin

ReconnectionProcess --> LeavePlatoon : reconnection failed

LeavePlatoon : entry / activate safe exit maneuver
LeavePlatoon : entry / move to standalone control

LeavePlatoon --> StandaloneDriving : platoon exit completed

NormalPlatoonDriving --> [*]
StandaloneDriving --> [*]

@enduml",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="nQ8X1Jz5qPS2RlHgU3DX-1"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1704" width="621" x="20" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
